string.name: intent_xiaoyi_extracted_no_keyword

string.name: intent_hint_when_xiaoyi_extracted_no_keyword
string.value:
Sorry, Xiaoyi lost track of your train of thought.
Tips：Please try starting a new conversation in Xiaoyi and explicitly instruct Xiaoyi to open a specific component or sample — this may yield better results.
